what: Check if an active session already exists
why: Must archive previous session before creating new one

output.console: Active session check result with session ID if one exists

success_handling.criteria: Active session check completes and returns whether an active session exists, along with its ID if present

error_handling.criteria: Cannot read session state directory to check for active sessions
error_handling.action: Assume no active session, proceed with creation, log warning

event.message: Could not read session state directory: {error}

decisions.outcome: Skip archive, proceed to create-state step
Archive previous session internally, then proceed to create-state step
Assume no active session, proceed to create-state step
